summary: Iteration 23 - Tested Fan Analytics Dashboard, Spotify Integration Placeholder, OG Meta Tags. Fixed critical bug: MusicNote import missing in SettingsPage.jsx. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working after fix.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/fan-analytics/overview - returns 200 with all required fields
Fan analytics platform_engagement has correct structure (name, streams, percentage, color)
Fan analytics top_countries has correct structure (country, streams, percentage)
Fan analytics listener_growth has correct structure (date, listeners)
Fan analytics peak_hours has correct structure (hour, count)
Fan analytics requires authentication (401/422 without auth)
GET /api/integrations/spotify/status - returns connected: false for unconnected users
POST /api/integrations/spotify/connect - saves connection intent
DELETE /api/integrations/spotify/disconnect - removes connection
Spotify status requires authentication
Spotify connect requires authentication
Spotify disconnect requires authentication
GET /api/share/beat/{id} - endpoint exists (returns 404 for invalid ID)
GET /api/share/release/{id} - endpoint exists (returns 404 for invalid ID)
GET /api/share/artist/{id} - endpoint exists (returns 404 for invalid ID)
GET /api/presave/campaigns - lists user's campaigns
GET /api/beats - returns beats list
GET /api/beats?search=test - search filter works
Frontend: OG meta tags present (og:title, og:description, twitter:card)
Frontend: Fan Analytics page loads with all 6 sections
Frontend: Fan Analytics shows stats cards (Pre-Save Subs, Countries, Total Streams, Campaigns)
Frontend: Fan Analytics shows Listener Growth chart (30 days)
Frontend: Fan Analytics shows Top Listener Countries with flags
Frontend: Fan Analytics shows Platform Engagement donut chart
Frontend: Fan Analytics shows Peak Listening Hours bar chart
Frontend: Fan Analytics nav item visible and highlighted in sidebar
Frontend: Settings Integrations tab loads correctly
Frontend: Spotify for Artists with Connect button visible
Frontend: Apple Music for Artists shows Coming Soon
Frontend: YouTube Music Analytics shows Coming Soon
Frontend: Spotify Connect button shows 'coming soon' toast
Frontend: Instrumentals page (beat search/filter) still working
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: MusicNote import was missing in SettingsPage.jsx - added to phosphor-icons import
Fan Analytics aggregates data from stream_events (3120+ events) and presave_campaigns
Spotify OAuth is a PLACEHOLDER - Connect button shows toast 'coming soon'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 tested: (1) Fan Analytics Dashboard at /fan-analytics - shows 4 stats cards (Pre-Save Subs, Countries, Total Streams, Campaigns), Listener Growth chart (30 days), Top Listener Countries with flags, Platform Engagement donut chart, Peak Listening Hours bar chart. Data aggregated from stream_events and presave_campaigns collections. (2) Spotify Integration Placeholder in Settings > Integrations tab - Connect button shows 'coming soon' toast, Apple Music and YouTube show 'Coming Soon' labels. (3) OG Meta Tags in index.html - og:title, og:description, twitter:card all present. Fixed MusicNote import bug in SettingsPage.jsx.

mocked_apis.Spotify OAuth: PLACEHOLDER - Connect button shows 'coming soon' toast

ui_components: Top Countries with flags and progress bars

endpoints: GET /api/integrations/spotify/status - returns {connected: bool, spotify_id?, display_name?, connected_at?}

settings_page_crash.issue: Settings page crashed with 'MusicNote is not defined' error
settings_page_crash.root_cause: MusicNote icon was used in Integrations tab but not imported from @phosphor-icons/react
settings_page_crash.fix: Added MusicNote to the import statement in SettingsPage.jsx
